scripts.build:exe: node scripts/fetch-better-sqlite-win.mjs && npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/agent.exe
scripts.build:config:exe: npm run build && pkg dist/configurator.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/agent-config.exe
scripts.build:agents:exe: node scripts/fetch-better-sqlite-win.mjs && npm run build && pkg dist/index.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/agent.exe && pkg dist/configurator.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/agent-config.exe
